feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from pasha

entry.title: consider this your reminder for today: if you don’t make your office meeting room bookings in time, you may have to conduct your meeting in the kitchen. which, most of the time…is okay, nobody cares. and if you don’t make your hotel room bookings well i
entry.content: consider this your reminder for today: if you don’t make your office meeting room bookings in time, you may have to conduct your meeting in the kitchen. which, most of the time…is okay, nobody cares. and if you don’t make your hotel room bookings well i

entry.title: we all know that the europe summer is fast approaching. I mean, it’s basically here. it’s time to panic. or not? let’s establish some ground rules for European summer this year together: - remember: we are not cutting or shredding for European summer. tha
entry.content: we all know that the europe summer is fast approaching. I mean, it’s basically here. it’s time to panic. or not? let’s establish some ground rules for European summer this year together: - remember: we are not cutting or shredding for European summer. tha

entry.title: you have the most friends when you are the worst version of yourself. true or no? now here is my review of common ways people meet and become friends with each other: social events, birthdays: these are good opportunities, however, transforming these ini

entry.title: dear manager, please stop asking me the same question again and again 😭😩 let’s remember: to manage upwards (i.e. manage your manager) you need to create amazing processes that make your manager’s life easier and save you and everyone else...time. to ensur

entry.title: every time I visit Europe, my heart overflows with anticipation and serenity. the thrill of exploring new cities and countries, meeting new people, and embracing fresh experiences never fades. I’m visiting Europe again, courtesy of @Eurail pass (all-in-o

entry.title: they go to NYC and LA and think they’re the main character #usa#comedy 🎥:@vince.lam
